You are debugging a runtime API failure. Analyze the failure and provide a structured diagnosis.

failure:
  request:
    method: POST
    url: /pay
    body: {"amount":100}
  response:
    status: 500
    body: {"error":"timeout"}
  error:
    type: timeout
    message: upstream service timed out after 30s

similar_cases[1]{fingerprint,rootCause,fix,category,confidence}:
  POST:/pay:500:timeout,Connection pool limit exceeded,Set MAX_CONNECTIONS=20 and added retry with backoff,,0.00

task:
  1. identify the root cause (1 sentence)
  2. suggest a concrete fix (1-3 sentences)
  3. list edge cases or related failure modes to watch for
  4. assign a category: timeout|auth|not_found|rate_limit|validation|upstream|config|unknown
